'''lazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaffingly|quaffingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaffingly|quaffingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lazate|lazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lazatesher|lazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazatesherĂ«m|lazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazatero|lazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lazateshĂ«|lazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazateshĂ«m|lazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazatero|gokilazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilazateshĂ«|gokilazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazateshĂ«m|gokilazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golazankerom|golazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golazankeshĂ«|golazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golazankeshĂ«m|golazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golazankeya|golazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazaterom|lazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazatemu|lazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lazateya|lazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazaterom|gokilazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazatemu|gokilazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilazateya|gokilazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lazazate|lazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lazazatesher|lazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazazatesherĂ«m|lazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazazatero|lazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lazazateshĂ«|lazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazazateshĂ«m|lazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazazatero|gokilazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilazazateshĂ«|gokilazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazazateshĂ«m|gokilazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golazazankerom|golazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golazazankeshĂ«|golazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golazazankeshĂ«m|golazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golazazankeya|golazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lazazaterom|lazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lazazatemu|lazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lazazateya|lazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilazazaterom|gokilazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilazazatemu|gokilazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilazazateya|gokilazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠte|lĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠtesher|lĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠtero|lĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠtero|gokilĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠzĂŠnkerom|golĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠzĂŠnkeya|golĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠterom|lĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠtemu|lĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠzĂŠteya|lĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠterom|gokilĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠzĂŠteya|gokilĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafzafte|lafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafzaftesher|lafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzaftesherĂ«m|lafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafzaftero|lafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafzafteshĂ«|lafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzafteshĂ«m|lafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafzaftero|gokilafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafzafteshĂ«|gokilafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafzafteshĂ«m|gokilafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafzafnkerom|golafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafzafnkeshĂ«|golafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafzafnkeshĂ«m|golafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafzafnkeya|golafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafzafterom|lafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafzaftemu|lafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafzafteya|lafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafzafterom|gokilafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafzaftemu|gokilafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafzafteya|gokilafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
